name: Gumbul Technologies Private Limited
idea: GenieJi is India's first AI Commerce company. We equip supermarkets with a unique operating model and an AI, IoT led logistics technology which enables our operating model

name: VBEST EDUCATION PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
Vbest Education Pvt. Ltd. is an EdTech platform focused on improving conceptual learning and performance analytics for students from school level to competitive exam preparation.

The platform provides structured topic-wise learning modules, and advanced analytics that track student performance from topic level → Chapter → subject level → academic level → institutional level.

Vbest Education has developed two specialized Platforms:

A. Student Learning Platform
	Students can enroll individually and access concept-based learning material, competitive exam preparation modules (EAMCET, ECET, etc.), practice tests, and performance analytics.

B. Institutional Academic Analytics Platform
	Schools, colleges, and coaching institutions can purchase the institutional software which provides deep academic analytics, including topic-level performance insights, student progress tracking, and institutional learning insights.

The goal of Vbest Education is to improve academic outcomes through data-driven learning and analytics.

name: MAHIRDONZ IRRIGATIONS PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: Mahirdonz Irrigations Private Limited is an agri-tech startup enabling farmers to easily claim government subsidies. The company has supported 1000+ farmers within one year and is now addressing payment transparency issues by building a digital platform for tracking subsidy status and ensuring efficient fund disbursement.

name: BLIMBEE TECH PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
BlimBee is an innovative technology startup focused on transforming the way learning and engagement happen in the digital age. With a strong foundation in immersive technologies, BlimBee develops cutting-edge mobile applications and platforms that combine creativity, interactivity, and education.

At its core, BlimBee aims to bridge the gap between traditional learning and modern digital experiences by leveraging Augmented Reality (AR), AI, intuitive design, and scalable tech solutions. The platform is designed to deliver engaging, user-friendly, and impactful experiences for children, educators, and brands alike.

Understanding the diversity of India, BlimBee strongly emphasizes multilingual accessibility, offering content and experiences across multiple Indian languages. This ensures that users from different regions can interact, learn, and engage in their preferred language, making the platform more inclusive and culturally relevant.

Driven by a passion for innovation and meaningful user engagement, BlimBee continuously evolves to create products that are not just functional, but memorable and enriching. Whether it's enhancing learning outcomes or building interactive brand experiences, BlimBee stands at the intersection of technology, creativity, and purpose.

name: SKIPP TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: SKIPP is a dine in food pre ordering Platform. It’s a e-commerce food tech.

name: PROLIST PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
PROLIST is a platform to help people find and connect with reliable professionals like architects, Interior designers, Landscape Architects, Engineers, Contractors, Web and App developers, legal consultants, event planners, and similar service providers.
Today, most of these services still work through referrals or fragmented listings, which makes it difficult for customers to find the right professional and for professionals to get relevant opportunities. PROLIST tries to solve this by structuring how requirements are posted and how professionals are matched, so both sides can engage more efficiently.

The idea is to gradually build a more organised and transparent ecosystem for professional services, where discovery, communication and engagement become simpler and more reliable.

name: SOVIV COLLECTIVES LLP
idea:
Soviv Collectives LLP is a direct-to-consumer fashion and lifestyle company focused on building accessible, quality-driven apparel brands for the Indian market. The company currently operates its brand SOVIV in the intimate wear category and is in the process of launching a second brand, Peaches &amp; Roses, for which trademark registration has been secured.

The business addresses the gap between affordability and quality by offering thoughtfully designed products that combine comfort, reliable materials, and practical design at accessible price points. It operates through a digital-first model across marketplaces such as Amazon and Flipkart, enabling wide customer reach without traditional retail overheads.

Soviv Collectives LLP has built a system-driven operational approach, including structured workflows for managing product variations, inventory conversion, and production tracking across multiple SKUs. An in-house quality control setup supported by dedicated machinery ensures consistent product standards before dispatch, improving reliability and customer trust.

The company also leverages customer feedback and marketplace data to continuously refine product design, sizing accuracy, and overall user experience. While currently focused on intimate wear, the company is expanding into adjacent categories such as loungewear, gymwear, and nightwear, aiming to build a broader fashion and lifestyle portfolio.

Through this combination of product focus, operational control, and data-driven improvements, Soviv Collectives LLP is building a scalable and differentiated presence in the Indian fashion and lifestyle market.

name: KRINSYS TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
KrinSys Technologies Private Limited is a technology-driven startup focused on building scalable digital infrastructure for education and healthcare institutions.

The company develops cloud-based SaaS platforms, including Gnanavyuham (school management system) and Medivyuham (healthcare management system), designed to streamline operations, enhance data-driven decision-making, and improve communication across stakeholders.

KrinSys leverages modern technologies to provide multi-tenant, role-based solutions that are accessible, configurable, and scalable for institutions of varying sizes, particularly in Tier 2 and Tier 3 regions.

With a vision of “Where Education Meets Care,” KrinSys aims to unify institutional management under a single digital ecosystem, enabling efficiency, transparency, and long-term scalability.

name: SRINIJA PROJECTS PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: Srinija Projects Pvt. Ltd. is a construction and infrastructure company focused on delivering cost-efficient and high-quality building solutions. Leveraging local material sourcing and optimized manpower, the company ensures faster execution, reduced costs, and reliable project delivery for residential, commercial, and civil works.

name: EVOTECH MODERN SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: Evotech Modern Solution Private Limited is an AI-powered SaaS company focused on revolutionizing professional productivity through intelligent automation. We design, develop, and deploy software products that leverage cutting-edge artificial intelligence to solve real-world challenges faced by professionals, job seekers, and businesses.

name: KHISE DIGITAL SOLUTION PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
Khise Digital Solution (KDS) is a technology-driven startup focused on building scalable digital solutions to simplify workforce management and business operations for small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in India.

Founded with a strong background in full-stack software development, KDS aims to bridge the gap between complex enterprise systems and the practical needs of growing businesses. We specialize in designing and developing cloud-based platforms that automate manual processes, improve operational efficiency, and ensure regulatory compliance.

Our approach is centered on delivering high-quality, reliable, and cost-effective solutions that are easy to adopt and scale. By leveraging modern technologies and a deep understanding of business workflows, we enable organizations to transition from traditional, manual systems to fully digital ecosystems.

name: B&R ENGINEERING SERVICES LLP
idea:
B&R Engineering Services LLP provides specialized engineering solutions for repair, rehabilitation and strengthening of reinforced concrete structures using advanced materials and modern techniques such as polymer grouting, structural retrofitting and durability enhancement systems, waterproofing etc.
The company focuses on innovative engineering methods that extend the service life of infrastructure, reduce construction waste and improve structural safety. Our business model is scalable across infrastructure, industrial and residential sectors and has strong potential to generate skilled employment in engineering, construction supervision and specialized repair works.

name: CONASPHERE TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: DoctorLab is a healthcare technology startup focused on simplifying access to diagnostic lab tests and health checkups. The platform helps users discover nearby pathology labs, compare prices, book tests online, schedule home sample collection, and access digital reports conveniently. DoctorLab aims to make diagnostic services more transparent, affordable, and accessible by connecting users with trusted local laboratories through a user-friendly digital platform.

name: REHOBOTH COUNCIL
idea: REHOBOTH COUNCIL is a social impact–driven startup operating in the domain of corporate social responsibility (CSR), focused on creating sustainable and inclusive development initiatives. The organization works with communities, corporates, and institutions to design and implement programs in areas such as education, skill development, healthcare, and environmental sustainability

name: SKYNEX FINBIZZ PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
SKYNEX FINBIZZ PRIVATE LIMITED is a professionally driven financial consultancy and business support company focused on delivering integrated solutions to businesses and individuals. The Company specializes in preparing and executing business plans, project reports, financial models, CMA data, and loan proposals, enabling clients to secure funding and scale operations effectively.
In addition, the Company provides end-to-end accounting, bookkeeping, payroll processing, MIS reporting, and operational support services, ensuring smooth and compliant business functioning.
The Company also represents and liaises on behalf of clients with banks, NBFCs, financial institutions, insurance companies, mutual fund houses, and regulatory authorities, facilitating seamless financial transactions and approvals.
To expand its service capabilities, SKYNEX FINBIZZ PRIVATE LIMITED actively seeks collaborations, strategic alliances, and agency partnerships with financial institutions and service providers, ensuring enhanced value delivery and comprehensive support to its clients.

name: GOCLOUDSTUDIO PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: The startup offers an AI-driven platform that combines behavioral interviews and coding assessments into a single workflow, along with AI-augmented development services, enabling faster hiring, improved candidate matching, and accelerated project delivery.

name: LOTUS INFOSYSTEM
idea: We empower businesses with cutting - edge technology, robust security and scalable solutions that drive long tem growth and success.

name: CHETAAMRUTT PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: BeMyMentor is a digital platform connecting students and early professionals with industry mentors. It provides personalized guidance, practical insights, and structured support through one-on-one sessions and programs, helping users gain clarity, confidence, and make informed career decisions.

name: ADVAITA CYBERNETICS PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
Advaita Cybernetics Private Limited is an Indian deep-tech startup pioneering the development of the world's first biologically accurate artificial general intelligence (AGI) system. Founded with the vision of creating machines that genuinely think, reason, learn, and evolve like the human brain, the company operates at the intersection of computational neuroscience, neuromorphic engineering, advanced robotics, and custom semiconductor design.
Unlike the current generation of artificial intelligence — large language models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude — which rely on statistical pattern matching over massive text corpora to predict the next word, our flagship platform TrinetraAI takes a fundamentally different approach. TrinetraAI is built on a spiking neural network (SNN) architecture modeled after the actual biological mechanisms of the human brain: 86 billion neurons with spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP), hippocampal memory, spreading activation for domain routing, first-principles reasoning from typed axioms, and biological sleep cycles for memory consolidation and creative synthesis.
The company's name "Advaita" (अद्वैत) is a Sanskrit philosophical term meaning "non-dual" — reflecting our core belief that consciousness and computation are not separate phenomena but two manifestations of the same underlying intelligence. This philosophy drives our engineering: rather than building narrow AI tools that mimic intelligence superficially, we are constructing a complete artificial being — brain, body, neuromorphic processor, custom GPU, and energy source.
Advaita Cybernetics is a full-stack AI company with no dependency on external AI providers. We design our own intelligence, hardware to run it, humanoid bodies to embody it, vision system to perceive the world, and energy core to power it Hridaya. This complete vertical integration — from silicon to cognition to embodiment — is unprecedented in the global AI industry.

name: THE ESSENTIAL NUTRA PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
We are building this company with one clear intention — to give children better, safer, and truly nourishing food options.

Today, many products made for kids are filled with excessive sugar, artificial additives, and ingredients that don’t support their long-term health. As people who deeply care about what goes into our bodies, we felt there was a need for something better — something parents can trust without second-guessing.

Our brand focuses on creating clean, functional nutrition for children by combining the goodness of everyday food with carefully chosen, science-backed ingredients.

We are committed to using only clean, high-quality ingredients, with no harmful additives, or unnecessary fillers. While our products deliver added nutritional benefits, they are made to feel familiar, enjoyable, and easy to include in a child’s daily routine.

At our core, we believe that nutrition should not feel like medicine — it should feel natural, safe, and made with care. Our goal is to build a brand that parents trust, children love, and families can rely on for better everyday choices.

Because when it comes to children’s health, only the best should be good enough.

name: CLUES LABS (OPC) PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
Clu is a technology driven hyperlocal marketplace comprising two applications, Clu (customer app) and Clu Partner (service provider app), designed to organize and digitize local service delivery in India while empowering local service providers.

Clu (customer app) connects users with trusted nearby service providers such as electricians, plumbers, laundry partners, car washers, pest control professionals, gardeners, and other skilled workers. The platform simplifies service discovery, booking, and payments through a seamless digital interface, improving accessibility and transparency for consumers.

Clu Partner (service provider app) enables local service professionals to onboard digitally, manage bookings, and access a wider customer base. It provides tools for scheduling, service management, and demand aggregation, empowering local service providers to improve operational efficiency and increase income opportunities within a structured ecosystem.

name: VANAE BY EISHA (OPC) PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: Vanae is a women led sustainable fashion startup focused on designing modern eco friendly apparel using ethical sourcing and responsible production practices. The brand operates through a direct to consumer model with outsourced manufacturing and leverages digital platforms to reach customers across India. Vanae emphasizes minimal and timeless design while ensuring quality and scalability. The company aims to build a circular fashion ecosystem by introducing recycled fabric innovation from plastic waste and plans to expand through offline retail stores in metropolitan cities while strengthening its sustainable supply chain.

name: REHABIPHY HEALTH TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
Rehabiphy Health Technologies Private Limited is an innovative health-tech startup transforming the way individuals approach rehabilitation and preventive wellness. Operating at the intersection of physiotherapy and digital health, Rehabiphy offers personalized, remote-first rehabilitation services tailored to modern lifestyles, especially for sedentary professionals facing posture-related and chronic health issues.
The platform integrates expert physiotherapy consultations, ergonomic correction, and customized recovery plans with its unique product, FitHabit—a gamified habit-building ecosystem that encourages users to adopt healthier daily routines such as walking, hydration, and exercise. By rewarding consistency through a coin-based system, Rehabiphy enhances user engagement and long-term adherence to wellness practices.
Positioned as a full-stack wellness ecosystem, Rehabiphy not only addresses pain management but also promotes proactive health improvement by connecting users with fitness services like gyms, yoga centers, and nutrition experts, ultimately reducing reliance on reactive healthcare.

name: PHOENIXINSIGHTS PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: PhoenixInsights Pvt. Ltd. provides AI and data analytics solutions for predictive modeling, automation, and business intelligence. It helps businesses make real-time decisions by integrating AI systems directly into workflows.

name: CAMPUSGARH PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: CampusGarh is an education startup offering personalized career counseling and admission guidance for students after Class 12 and graduation. With a student-first approach, it provides transparent, verified information on colleges and courses, helping students make informed, confident decisions for their future.

name: SUVARI RESOURCE RECOVERY PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: Suvari Resource Recovery Pvt. Ltd. is an emerging deep-tech venture in the circular economy sector, dedicated to the industrial-scale conversion of organic waste into high-value resources. Based in Kerala, the company bridges the gap between laboratory research and real-world industrial application through advanced biotechnology and chemical engineering.

name: TRUESECUR TECHNOLOGIES LLP
idea:
TrueSecur Technologies LLP is an AI-native cybersecurity startup incorporated on 21 November 2025, focused on building proprietary products and productized services in AI governance, AI-based SOC maturity assessment, digital forensics, and enterprise cybersecurity. The company was founded to address a major gap in the market: traditional cybersecurity assessments and governance models are largely static, manual, and not designed for AI-era risks such as insecure enterprise AI adoption, prompt injection, model misuse, sensitive data leakage, and evolving SOC capability requirements.

TrueSecur is developing technology-led solutions that combine cybersecurity engineering, assessment frameworks, automation, and applied research. Its current focus areas include an AI-based SOC maturity platform designed to make security assessment more evidence-driven and scalable, and an enterprise AI governance platform intended to help organizations adopt external AI systems securely through policy enforcement, monitoring, and data protection controls.
Since launch, the company has already generated approximately INR 6.5 lakh in revenue, demonstrating early commercial validation. TrueSecur has executed paid cybersecurity work for enterprise customers, including digital forensics-related solution development in the drone ecosystem. The founder has also delivered cybersecurity services connected to the IITM Pravartak ecosystem through a third party and holds an appointment as a consultant-ad.  The company is pursuing enterprise opportunities for its AI governance and AI-native security offerings while contributing to confidential strategic govt projects that cannot be publicly disclosed due to sensitivity and contractual restrictions.
TrueSecur operates with a long-term vision of transitioning from consulting-led execution to scalable platform-led cybersecurity products. Its business model combines B2B SaaS, APIs, specialized cybersecurity services, and research-driven solutions

name: WEFETCH TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
Wefetch is a sustainability and ESG services company that provides subscription-based virtual sustainability teams for small and medium enterprises (SMEs). We help businesses manage ESG reporting, regulatory compliance, and carbon tracking without the need for in-house teams.

Our services cover global and regional frameworks such as CBAM, BRSR, GRI, and EcoVadis. By combining domain expertise with technology-enabled workflows, we simplify complex sustainability requirements and make compliance affordable, scalable, and continuous.

Wefetch aims to bridge the gap between growing regulatory demands and limited in-house capabilities of SMEs, enabling them to become globally competitive and environmentally responsible.

name: SHREEKARI LOCOTECH SERVICES
idea:
Shreekari Locotech Services is a professional maintenance and infrastructure solutions provider specializing in government tenders. We are committed to delivering high-quality upkeep, repair, and engineering services across a wide range of infrastructure and industrial projects, strictly adhering to government standards and regulatory requirements. We majorly focus on railway projects.

With a focus on efficiency, reliability, and innovation, we continuously strive to enhance service quality while reducing project turnaround time. Our approach integrates modern techniques and streamlines processes to deliver effective and sustainable solutions.

Our Services
We offer a comprehensive range of services, including:
1. Civil, Mechanical, and Electrical Works- Complete execution of engineering and infrastructure projects.
2. Technical & Hardware Support - Supply, maintenance, and repair of machinery and equipment.
3. Maintenance & Repair Solutions- Rehabilitation, fabrication, overhauling, welding, and painting of wagons and industrial assets.
4. Workshop & Housekeeping Support- Efficient operational support for workshops and industrial facilities.
5. Electrical Installations- Installation of electrical equipment for general and industrial purposes.
6. Motor Works - Servicing, repair, and maintenance of motors and related systems.
7. Transportation Services - Reliable logistics solutions for goods and general operational needs.
8. Material Procurement - Sourcing and supply of quality materials for project requirements.
9. Manpower Supply- Provision of skilled and unskilled workforce for various operational needs.

name: Urjiva Bioinnovations
idea: Along with agritech solutions, our startup is developing a novel bio-integrated platform for sustainable resource recovery that utilizes engineered plant–microbe systems to extract valuable elements from low-grade sources such as industrial residues, mine tailings, and marginal soils. By combining rhizosphere-driven mobilization with biological accumulation and controlled downstream processing, we convert diffuse resources into concentrated, refinery-compatible feedstock. This approach offers a low-energy, environmentally responsible alternative to conventional extraction methods, while also enabling on-site waste remediation. Designed as a modular and adaptable system, the technology can be deployed across diverse feedstocks and geographies, supporting circular economy goals, improving resource efficiency, and strengthening sustainable industrial supply chains.

name: JURISFLO PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
Jurisflo is building India’s first AI-powered legal operating system—redefining how legal professionals work, think, and deliver outcomes.

The legal ecosystem today is vast but deeply fragmented. Lawyers juggle multiple tools, manual processes, and disconnected systems for case management, research, drafting, and court workflows. This not only reduces efficiency but also slows down the delivery of justice itself.

Jurisflo was created to change that.

We bring together legal workflows, intelligence, and automation into one unified platform, enabling advocates and law firms to manage their entire practice from a single intelligent dashboard. Powered by a domain-validated AI architecture, Jurisflo delivers accurate, contextual, and reliable assistance across research, drafting, analysis, and decision-making—transforming AI from a generic tool into a true legal co-pilot.

But our vision goes beyond productivity.

We are building the foundation for India’s digital justice infrastructure—a connected ecosystem that will eventually serve not just advocates, but also courts, institutions, and the broader legal system. By reducing inefficiencies, improving transparency, and accelerating workflows, Jurisflo aims to make legal practice more effective and justice more accessible.

At its core, Jurisflo is driven by a simple belief:
The future of law is not manual—it is intelligent, unified, and built for scale.

name: AI NAMA PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: AI Nama is an intelligent, voice enabled,  indic language-first Mobile App &amp; website real estate search engine designed for the Indian market.

name: EDSY EDUCATION PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: Edsy is an education-focused startup that aims to make quality and personalized learning accessible to students beyond major urban centers. It connects students with skilled tutors through a structured platform, ensuring consistent teaching standards and better learning outcomes. By combining technology with a curated tutor network, Edsy simplifies the process of finding the right guidance and supports students in achieving their academic goals.

name: DSRTOS TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
DSRTOS Technologies Pvt. Ltd. is a Bengaluru-based deep-technology startup developing India's first indigenously designed safety-critical Real-Time Operating System (RTOS) for mission-critical embedded applications across avionics, defence, automotive, and industrial sectors.
The flagship DSRTOS kernel is engineered to achieve DO-178C DAL-A, ISO 26262 ASIL-D, IEC 61508 SIL-3, and FIPS 140-3 Level 2 international certifications. Hardware-validated on ARM Cortex-M7 at 480MHz across 70 rigorous kernel test cases, DSRTOS demonstrates superior real-time performance against globally established RTOS platforms, operating within a sub-1MB memory footprint.
The company holds 37 Indian provisional patents and 4 PCT international applications covering innovations in real-time scheduling, memory management, fault tolerance, and cryptographic security.
With formal outreach initiated to HAL Avionics Division, DRDO CAIR, and BEL Bengaluru, and funding pursuits under iDEX/ADITI and SISFS schemes, DSRTOS Technologies is strategically positioned to deliver a world-class sovereign embedded operating system — directly advancing India's Atmanirbhar Bharat mission in critical defence and aerospace systems.

name: AI FOR HUMANITY PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: LongMemory.io is a Memory-as-a-Service platform enabling AI and voice agents to retain, manage, and retrieve contextual user data for accurate, personalized interactions. It simplifies AI memory infrastructure, reduces costs, improves efficiency, and delivers scalable, model-agnostic solutions for enterprises.

name: AKAASA INFOTECH PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: AKAASA Technologies Private Limited, incorporated in India in 2022, is a pioneering tech staffing and recruitment solutions provider, specializing in IT staffing and offshore resource management. Operating at the intersection of technology and human capital, AKAASA addresses the critical talent gap in India’s burgeoning digital economy by connecting businesses with highly skilled professionals in fields like software development, cloud computing, cybersecurity, AI, and emerging technologies such as quantum computing, AKAASA is a lean, independent entity, not formed by splitting or reconstructing an existing business, making it eligible for Startup India recognition.

name: ADVAIT DRISHTI GRC PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
We at Advait Drishti GRC, bring over three decades of collective experience in Information Systems to deliver Governance, Risk and Compliance (GRC) relevance and offer a unified perspective on complex mandates.
We help clients move beyond fragmented data and reports to view GRC as one interconnected system.
The combination of the coined words “Advait Drishti” symbolises the idea of having an integrated, holistic perspective towards IT- GRC (Governance, Risk, and Compliance) .
We will be engaged in the business of providing consulting services for IT GRC processes and solutions to organizations. It will also offer software development services and application support for solutions developed by it and other related professional services.

The company has develop and deploy a platform (Sutraधार) to transform reactive compliance into predictive IT governance framework, gap analysis &amp; risk management based on scientific data analysis and intelligent decision support. 

Sutraधार platform will enable organizations to clearly understand their compliance status and risk exposure relating to Information Technology (both financial and operational), comprehensively and accurately, thereby reflecting the core objective of a modern IT GRC platform.

name: SINEVOLT CONTROL PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
SineVolt Control offers a wide range of high performance batteries, including both cylindrical and prismatic cell types, suitable for various battery energy storage systems. Our offerings include lithium-ion batteries, Lithium Iron Phosphate (LFP), and Lithium Nickel Manganese Cobalt Oxide (NMC).

SineVolt Control provides battery pack assembly and digitalization solutions that support clean energy storage, electric mobility, UPS, telecom, defence, datacenter. 
BESS (Battery Energy Storage Systems)
Futuristic energy storage units labeled SineVolt Control with glowing neon lights.
Grid-scale battery energy storage systems for renewable energy storage and energy management ensure a stable power supply and provide essential grid support. These systems are designed with high performance batteries, including advanced lithium-ion batteries, featuring an integrated BMS that connects from cell to module, module to rack, rack to container, and through to power system integration.

Electric Vehicles and E-Rickshaw
A sleek SineVolt Control battery displaying a 98% charge with futuristic circuit designs.
High-performance lithium-ion batteries serve as essential battery energy storage systems, delivering long range, fast charging, and reliable performance for electric cars and E2V, E23V vehicles.

E-bikes
SineVolt Control electronic device on a wooden table with a bicycle in the background.
Lightweight, energy-dense lithium-ion batteries designed as high performance batteries are optimized for extended pedal-assist range and quick recharge in electric bicycles, making them ideal battery energy storage systems.

Emergency Electrical Services
Futuristic SineVolt Control battery in front of a drone on a tech-themed background.
Lightweight, high-performance batteries, such as lithium-ion batteries, provide effective battery energy storage systems that support long flight times and rapid power delivery for UAVs.

name: GLOMAMA CARE PRIVATE LTD
idea: Glomama is a modern maternity care brand built to support women through pregnancy with safe, effective, and thoughtfully designed products.

name: JHELUM ZAIKA LLP
idea: Jhelum Zaika is a pioneering riverside startup on the Jhelum, introducing Kashmir’s first plant-based meat innovations. We blend traditional flavors with eco-friendly, sustainable dining. By prioritizing organic ingredients and environmental consciousness, we are redefining the culinary landscape of the Valley through ethical and delicious food.

name: GO MOBILITY TECH PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
GO Mobility is an innovative driver-first ride aggregation platform focused on solving key challenges in India’s mobility sector, particularly low driver earnings and unpredictable pricing. Unlike existing platforms that charge high commissions (25–35%), GO Mobility follows a low, fixed platform fee model with a daily cap, enabling drivers to achieve predictable and higher earnings.

The platform offers multi-modal transportation services including bike taxis, auto-rickshaws, and cabs, with plans to expand into corporate mobility, logistics, and delivery services. It uses a controlled surge pricing model (capped at 1.75x) and a hybrid convenience fee structure to ensure fair pricing for riders while maintaining platform sustainability.

GO Mobility is initially launching in NCR (Gurgaon, Noida, and Delhi) using a micro-zone strategy to ensure strong demand-supply balance and high driver utilization. The company aims to build India’s most driver-centric mobility ecosystem, starting from grassroots innovation — “Built in Bihar, Built for Bharat” — and scaling across major cities in India.

name: CARBON BHOOMI CLIMATE TECH PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: Carbon Bhoomi Climate Tech Private Limited is an emerging climate-tech startup focused on transforming agriculture and allied industries through sustainable, data-driven, and climate-positive solutions.

name: Tagshop AI
idea: Tagshop AI helps brands to generate AI Ads. Currently we are working with 260+ clients across the globe.

name: Flowgenix Business Solutions Private Limited
idea: Flowgenix is an AI-first digital transformation platform focused on enabling enterprises to build and deploy scalable solutions with speed, efficiency, and minimal technical complexity. The platform offers a product-based, low-code approach with reusable modules and built-in AI capabilities, supporting rapid innovation across industries.A key focus is its ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) solutions, providing capabilities such as carbon accounting, sustainability reporting, and compliance with global frameworks like GRI, SASB, and TCFD. The platform helps organizations enhance regulatory compliance, improve transparency, and drive sustainable, responsible growth aligned with national and global ESG objectives.

name: ONEROOT AGROTECH
idea: We are into RTD drinks such as fruit juices and CSD with sugar alternatives that provides nearly zero calorie

name: HYPERFIZZ BEVERAGES PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: Hyperfizz Beverages Private Limited is a Bangalore-based startup creating SIP-0, a zero-sugar, low-calorie sparkling water fortified with vitamins. We are solving a major problem in the ₹2.5 Lakh Crore beverage market by offering a genuinely healthy, affordable alternative to high-sugar sodas that contribute to lifestyle diseases.

name: DISHHUM TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
Dishhum: Content-Sharing &amp; Social Engagement Platform
Dishhum Technologies Private Limited is building an integrated digital content ecosystem named "Dishhum". Currently, the platform provides a robust environment for users to create, share, and discover Short-form Videos and Image-based Posts, covering diverse categories like entertainment, comedy, and educational content.

Our Current Innovation:
The platform is designed with a low-latency architecture specifically optimized for Indian network conditions (Bharat). Our core focus is on a regional-first approach, ensuring that vernacular content creators from Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities have a platform that prioritizes their local context and language through an intelligent discovery algorithm.

Scalability &amp; Roadmap:
While the current version focuses on high-quality Video and Post engagement, our roadmap includes the integration of interactive Stories and a comprehensive Creator Monetization Suite. These upcoming features are designed to provide creators with sustainable income streams and deeper audience engagement tools. Dishhum is built on a scalable cloud infrastructure, ensuring it can handle millions of users as we expand our feature set.

Impact:
By bridging the gap between talent and visibility, Dishhum aims to contribute to the 'Digital India' mission. We are creating a home-grown social infrastructure that not only entertains but also has the potential to generate employment in the digital economy and support the 'Atmanirbhar Bharat' initiative.

name: ENTANTRA Q SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
ENTANTRA Q is a technology-driven digital advertising startup focused on providing smart advertising
solutions inside public transport vehicles such as buses, autos, and commercial vehicles. The company
operates at the intersection of hardware, software, and digital media by integrating display systems with
automated advertisement management technology.
The business involves the design, development, deployment, and operation of digital advertising
systems that enable brands to reach commuters in a cost-effective and measurable way.

name: DRIFTSYNC SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
Driftsync Solutions Private Limited is a technology company focused on building scalable digital platforms for businesses and government systems. The company develops AI-powered software, web platforms, and automation solutions that improve operational efficiency and digital transformation.

One of our major initiatives is EatssApp, a rural-focused food delivery and logistics platform designed to connect local restaurants, vendors, and delivery partners in semi-urban and rural areas where large platforms like Zomato and Swiggy have limited reach.

Our solutions focus on affordability, accessibility, and scalability to enable small businesses to participate in the digital economy.

name: NOVYTE MATERIALS PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: The company focuses on research, development, and commercialization of advanced technologies to support innovation in manufacturing and materials science. It develops AI- and data-driven platforms, including SaaS and cloud-based solutions, to optimize industrial processes, accelerate product development, and improve decision-making. The company also works on the design and development of advanced and sustainable materials, such as composites and nanomaterials, and provides research, consultancy, and training services to enhance R&D capabilities across manufacturing and related industries

name: ZOMINT TECH PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: Zomint is an AI-enabled wealth management platform focused on helping Indian investors make better long-term investment decisions through goal-based planning, portfolio insights, and ongoing advisor guidance. The platform combines technology with human advisors to improve investor behaviour, portfolio discipline, and financial outcomes.

name: SIDDIQUI CONSTRUCTION PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: SIDDIQUI CONSTRUCTION PRIVATE LIMITED is engaged in providing EPC and turnkey construction solutions with specialization in water and wastewater management systems such as STP, WTP and ETP. The company integrates modern engineering practices, automation technologies like PLC & SCADA, and sustainable construction methods to deliver efficient, cost-effective and eco-friendly infrastructure solutions for government and corporate clients. Our focus is on innovation, quality and timely project execution to support urban and industrial development.

name: POOJYAYA INFRA TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: POOJYAYA INFRA TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED develops SATAT-based Bio-CNG plants using Napier grass and cattle dung, producing around 10 TPD of clean fuel along with FOM and CO₂ by-products. The company supports sustainable energy generation while creating additional rural income opportunities.

name: DEATOMIZE LLP
idea: Portal is an AI-powered language learning platform focused on Indian languages. It uses interactive stories, native audio, and real-life scenarios to help users learn quickly. Personalized paths, offline access, and community features make learning practical, engaging, and scalable.

name: VY EV POWER HOUSE CHARGING SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: VY EV Power House Charging Solutions pvt.ltd is an innovative EV Infrastructure startup focused on high-speed DC charging solutions (60kW). We are solving the 'App Fatigue' problem in the EV ecosystem by providing a seamless, app-free user experience. Our chargers feature a custom 7-inch touchscreen interface where customers can directly enter charging units and pay via a universal Razorpay UPI QR code, eliminating the need to download multiple third-party apps. We aim to scale this model through a franchise system to create a reliable, high-speed charging network across commercial hubs.

name: REDWILLS INTERACTIVE PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
REDWILLS INTERACTIVE is a game development startup based in Kerala, India, focused on creating high-quality PC games and immersive interactive experiences. Our mission is to deliver compelling storytelling through innovative gameplay, combining creativity, technology, and engaging design.

We have successfully developed and launched our first title, "Thekku Island," a 3D PC game that has received strong positive feedback from both Indian and global gaming audiences. The game reflects elements of Kerala heritage and culture while maintaining international standards of quality and performance.

Our team is dedicated to building unique gaming experiences that blend cultural inspiration with modern game development technologies. While we take inspiration from Indian traditions and storytelling, we are equally focused on exploring diverse genres and innovative concepts beyond cultural themes.

Currently, we are actively working on multiple new game ideas aimed at expanding our portfolio and reaching a broader global audience.

Our vision is to establish REDWILLS INTERACTIVE as a globally recognized game development company that delivers high-quality, story-driven, and impactful gaming experiences.

name: SIDHGUN TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
With over 50 years of experience in chemicals and manufacturing, the promoters deeply understand the procurement and supply chain management of industrial raw material. Sumairo has been designed and built for faster, smarter decisions, so that you can focus on growing.
We shall connect trusted buyers and suppliers globally and domestically. Our AI-driven platform provides insights to simplify your supply chain, enhance product security, widen market reach and optimize inventory management. The AI based news insights shall help in staying ahead of trends and disruptions with market analysis, empowering both buyer and suppliers with the intelligence to make proactive decisions with core competence. Sumairo plans to provide support from sourcing to delivery thus ensuring operational smoothness for unconstrained growth.

name: LABSENZ (OPC) PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: Labsenz (OPC) Private Limited supports innovation through AI-native platforms that leverage Generative AI, NLP, and LLMs to transform unstructured data into structured intelligence. Its cloud-based, scalable architecture enables automated workflows and efficient data management across global user segments.

name: AIM UP EDUPARTNERS PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
Aim Up Edupartners Private Limited is an emerging EdTech company focused on transforming access to higher education in India through its digital platform, DegreeKaro. The company enables students across the country to discover, compare, and enroll in UGC-approved online degree programs offered by reputed universities.

The startup addresses a critical gap in the higher education ecosystem — lack of awareness, fragmented information, and limited accessibility to recognized online degree programs. By building a centralized, technology-driven platform, Aim Up Edupartners simplifies the student journey from program discovery to enrollment and ongoing support.

Through strategic partnerships with universities, the company ensures that students have access to credible, government-recognized programs with complete transparency in eligibility, fees, and outcomes. Its digital-first approach combines counseling support, structured information, and seamless onboarding processes to enhance student decision-making.

The business operates on a scalable, asset-light model, allowing rapid expansion across geographies without infrastructure constraints. With a strong focus on innovation and student outcomes, Aim Up Edupartners aims to contribute significantly to increasing India’s Gross Enrollment Ratio (GER) in higher education while building a trusted, nationwide education platform.

name: PASSION SUPPORT PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
Passion Invesco, a unit of Passion Support Private Limited, stands as a dynamic, future-ready leader in India’s financial and investment landscape — dedicated to redefining the way the nation invests. With a steadfast focus on simplicity, transparency, and technology, we empower individuals to build sustainable wealth and achieve long-term financial independence with confidence. Our GST registration is also attached for compliance and verification purposes.
Our cutting-edge software and mobile platform—available on both iOS and Android—serves as a comprehensive destination for mutual funds, insurance, bonds, unlisted shares, fixed deposits, and a wide range of financial instruments. Driven by our mission to deliver intelligent tools, expert insights, and reliable investment opportunities, Passion Invesco ensures every investor experiences consistent growth, resilience, and prosperity.

name: DATRE RENEWABLE ENERGY PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: Datre Renewable Energy Pvt. Ltd. is a clean energy technology company focused on developing innovative waste heat recovery solutions. The company specializes in ORC-based systems to convert low and medium-grade waste heat into usable power, enabling industries to improve energy efficiency and reduce carbon emissions. With a strong emphasis on R&D, patented technologies, and strategic collaborations, Datre aims to deliver scalable and sustainable energy solutions.

name: HALLEYX SOFTWARE PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: Halleyx Software Private Limited is an emerging IT startup. The company focuses on delivering innovative software solutions, including web and mobile application development, customized enterprise software, and digital transformation services for businesses. With a vision to empower organizations through technology, Halleyx aims to provide scalable, efficient, and cost-effective solutions tailored to client needs. The startup is driven by a commitment to quality, continuous learning, and adopting modern technologies to solve real-world business challenges. By leveraging a skilled team and agile development practices, the company strives to build long-term client relationships and contribute to the growing digital ecosystem

name: BLENDBOX INNOVATIONS LLP
idea:
MuscleBoxPro is an innovative health-tech startup developing intelligent automated protein shake vending machines designed to improve access to safe, hygienic, and personalized nutrition in fitness and wellness environments. The company integrates automation, IoT-based monitoring, and digital payment systems to deliver freshly prepared protein shakes instantly with consistent quality and minimal human intervention.

The solution addresses operational inefficiencies, hygiene risks, and limited availability of post-workout nutrition in gyms and fitness centers. By automating ingredient dispensing, blending, and portion control, MuscleBoxPro ensures standardized nutrition delivery while reducing manpower dependency and improving customer experience.

The startup is building a scalable platform that combines smart hardware, cloud connectivity, and data analytics to optimize machine performance, inventory management, and user engagement. MuscleBoxPro’s technology can be deployed across gyms, corporate offices, educational institutions, and healthcare facilities, enabling a modern, automated nutrition ecosystem.

name: SPARKELA TALKIES PRIVATE LIMITED
idea: Sparkela Talkies Pvt. Ltd. is a creative production company operating a decentralized, asset-light, tech-enabled ecosystem for film, photography, and digital content. It combines a curated talent network with standardized workflows and AI-assisted tools to deliver scalable, high-quality creative solutions.

name: CRUISE CABS PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
Corporate Cruise is an AI-powered employee transportation platform designed to solve the inefficiencies and high costs of daily office commuting.

Many employees lack access to organized transport, leading to unreliable travel, higher expenses, and unstructured commute patterns. Corporate Cruise addresses this through shared, fixed-route transportation delivered via a subscription-based model, making daily travel predictable and cost-efficient.

The platform uses AI-driven routing and intelligent user clustering to group commuters based on location and travel requirements. AI-based route planning continuously optimizes routes, improves seat utilization, and enhances overall operational efficiency.

By combining structured execution with AI-powered optimization, Corporate Cruise is building a scalable and reliable employee mobility network that reduces commute costs and improves daily travel experience.
